items.title: Vercel Releases Eve: An Open-Source AI Agent Framework Where Each Agent is a Directory of Files Mapped to Capabilities
items.summary: Vercel has open-sourced eve, an Apache-2.0 agent framework now in public preview. An agent is a directory of files, with durable execution, sandboxes, approvals, connections, channels, and evals built in. Scaffold with npx eve@latest init and...

items.title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

items.title: Google Cloud generative AI automates council planning operations
items.summary: Government ministries are deploying Google Cloud generative AI across municipal agencies to automate council planning operations. Public sector administration handles vast volumes of unstructured data that delay infrastructure development. The UK...

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

items.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA): a Two-Branch Block-Sparse Attention Trained on a 109B-Parameter MoE With a 3T-Token Budget
items.summary: MiniMax released MSA, a sparse attention built on Grouped Query Attention. A lightweight Index Branch selects Top-k key-value blocks per query and GQA group; the Main Branch attends only to those blocks. It matches GQA on downstream benchmarks...

items.title: OpenAI’s Deployment Simulation Extends Pre-Deployment Risk Assessment to Agentic Coding Through Simulated Tool Calls
items.summary: OpenAI introduced Deployment Simulation on June 16, 2026. The method replays past conversations through a new candidate model before release. It then grades the completions to estimate deployment-time rates of undesired behavior. We break down...

items.title: Agentic Resource Discovery: Let agents search
